LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Whitespring forsvar
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Whitespring krigsløsninger
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Bygg presidentinnredning som Whitespring-tepper, speil, flotte stoler, Whitespring-plater, kandelaber og mer.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: presidentinnredning
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Konstruer en president-skrivebordsstol egnet for senior Whitespring-tjenestemenn og deres seremonielle oppgaver.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidentens skrivebordsstol
